cards.front: What is the primary focus of the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: Instructor presents information to students through lectures and discussions

cards.front: What is the main characteristic of a PowerPoint Presentation?
cards.back: Prepared slides with text and images presented in a sequence

cards.front: What is the name of the strategic concept that involves randomizing a player's actions?
What is the primary goal of the Teaching-Learning Process?
cards.back: To facilitate student learning and understanding of the subject matter

cards.front: What is the name of the process by which students learn through a combination of instruction and practice?
